name: sonix
description: Sonix — ad-free music streaming. Monorepo root scripts.

scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix backend
